title: eragrostis beninensis
intro: Eragrostis beninensis is a type of grass native to West Africa, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and fight off infections. Eragrostis beninensis is traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and has been reported to have potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
